news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that a record number of 1,000 new COVID-19 cases have been confirmed in the country. This surge brings the total number of known cases to 10,000. Additionally, the death toll has risen to 150, with 10 new fatalities reported in the last 24 hours. Authorities have expressed concerns about the rapid increase in cases and have urged the public to adhere to safety measures such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing to curb the spread of the virus. The government is considering implementing stricter restrictions to tackle the rising cases and protect public health.

news.summary: Representative Don Davis from North Carolina's 1st district and Senator Tim Kaine from Virginia came together to honor the week of May 12-18 as National Salvation Army Week. In an event held in Alexandria, Virginia on May 14, 2025, both chambers of Congress acknowledged the efforts of The Salvation Army. This recognition signifies the importance of the week dedicated to celebrating the organization's contributions to the community. The commemoration highlights the impact of The Salvation Army's work, emphasizing the significant role it plays in aiding and supporting those in need.
news.headline: US Congress honors The Salvation Army during National Salvation Army Week, May 12-18, 2025, with Congressman Don Davis and Sen. Tim Kaine.

news.summary: Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN) is currently experiencing a notable surge both in its stock performance and media coverage. Within the last month, the crypto exchange's shares have surged by almost 47%, surpassing Bitcoin's 22% increase as well as the S&P 500's 9% rise. This surge seems to be primarily driven by two significant factors: firstly, its scheduled inclusion into the S&P 500 on May 19, and secondly, its recent acquisition of the prominent crypto options firm, Deribit. Coinbase's CEO, Brian Armstrong, is also making headlines by advocating for a more efficient financial system. This surge in performance and attention indicates positive momentum for the company. For more details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Coinbase (COIN) stock jumps 47% before S&P 500 debut, outperforming Bitcoin and S&P 500 with an upcoming inclusion and new acquisition.

news.summary: Cryptocurrencies are trading sideways as Bitcoin dominance remains stagnant, possibly indicating a shift of capital towards altcoins. Prices of major cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, XRP, Dogecoin, and Shiba Inu have seen minor fluctuations recently. Notable statistics from IntoTheBlock show an increase in large transaction volume and daily active addresses, while transactions over $100,000 have slightly decreased. Exchanges netflows are notably down.Coinglass data reveals that 139,936 traders were liquidated in the past 24 hours, amounting to $408.44 million. Analysts like Ali Martinez noted that 100,000 BTC have been withdrawn from exchanges in three weeks, signaling rising investor confidence. The market saw over $35 billion in trade volume during the same period, indicating increased activity. Martinez suggests that if Bitcoin reaches $105,244, it might lead to $25.38 million in short liquidations, potentially triggering a significant upward movement in the market.
news.headline: Cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin flat as investors eye altcoins. Bitcoin $103,380.01 -0.9%, Ethereum $2,600.38 -1.6%, XRP $2.55 -0.3%, Dogecoin $0.2335 -2.1%. Key stats: 100,000 BTC withdrawn from exchanges, $35 billion inflow in 3 weeks. 139,936 traders liquidated in 24 hrs for $408.44 million. Bitcoin surpassing $105,244 could lead to $25.38 million in short liquidations.

news.summary: In Santiago, Chile on May 14, 2025, Banco Itaú Chile (SSE: ITAUCL) received a positive outlook revision from S&P Global Ratings. The change from "Stable" to "Positive" was influenced by improved asset quality metrics, enhanced capitalization, and reduced exposure to Colombia.
news.headline: S&P upgrades Banco Itaú Chile's outlook to Positive from Stable due to asset quality, capitalization, and reduced Colombia exposure.

news.summary: In Oakland, California, a press release dated May 9, 2025, has been updated to announce Well People's Mother's Day campaign, focusing on "pregnancy-friendly" beauty products for new and expecting mothers. The campaign includes special bundles such as the "Glowing Mama Makeup Set" and "Nurtured Skincare Set" featuring hero products like the Daygleamer Mineral Sunscreen Serum and Lush Lip Tinted Oil, ideal for self-care rituals for expecting moms. These products are designed specifically for mothers and have received awards for their quality and safety.
news.headline: Well People launches Mother’s Day campaign for new & expecting mothers, offering special bundles like “Glowing Mama Makeup Set” and “Nurtured Skincare Set” with hero products.

news.summary: Mayor Harrell has revealed an investment totaling $1 million from the City, The Asian American Foundation (TAAF), and Amazon. The funds will be utilized to enhance blocks, businesses, and overall quality of life in the core of the historic district. This initiative will kick off the "TAAF Cities" program with the launch of the C-ID Ambassadors Program, aimed at fostering collaboration across sectors for community betterment.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on May 14, 2025, Boast, a prominent provider of R&D tax credit software and innovation funding intelligence in North America, received the prestigious recognition of being named the 2025 R&D Tax Credit Software Advisory Firm of the Year for the United States by Global Advisory Experts (GAE). This award highlights Boast's exceptional expertise and leadership in the industry.
news.headline: Boast named 2025 R&D Tax Credit Software Advisory Firm of the Year in U.S. by Global Advisory Experts.

news.summary: The U.S. Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) has released a draft guidance for public input regarding the third round of negotiations within the Medicare Drug Price Negotiation Program. This initiative aims to reduce prescription drug costs and marks the inclusion of drugs under Medicare Part B for the first time. The guidance outlines plans to renegotiate prices for certain medications already negotiated for the years 2026 or 2027, and mandates that drugmakers must provide the agreed-upon prices during these periods. Additionally, it extends pricing regulations for Part D drugs until 2028. The initial negotiations covered 10 Part D drugs, concluding in August 2024, with a second phase currently addressing an additional 15 Part D drugs. These efforts align with broader strategies to address drug pricing concerns, including recent executive orders that may impact pharmaceutical stocks.
news.headline: CMS plans to expand Medicare Drug Price Negotiation Program to include Part B meds in 2026. Draft guidance released for public comment on third cycle of negotiations, with new policies introduced for renegotiating drug prices. First round covered 10 Part D drugs, with second round ongoing for additional 15 drugs.

news.summary: Introducing weight loss injections to all eligible individuals in the U.K. has the potential to generate an economic upsurge of 4.5 billion pounds (approximately $5.99 billion) annually, as per recent research unveiled at the European Congress on Obesity in Málaga, Spain. The study emphasizes the broader societal and productivity advantages of Novo Nordisk A/S' semaglutide, commercially known as Wegovy and Ozempic. By 2050, the global obesity epidemic is expected to impact 3.8 billion adults and nearly 750 million children and adolescents. In the U.K., 26.5% of adults are presently obese, with 4.6 million individuals diagnosed with type 2 diabetes, costing the nation an estimated 100 billion pounds. Moreover, a comparative study between Eli Lilly's Zepbound and Novo Nordisk's Wegovy showcased Zepbound's superior weight loss effects. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Novo Nordisk's Ozempic weight loss injections in the UK could boost economy by $6 billion. Globally, obesity is projected to affect 3.8 billion adults and nearly 750 million children by 2050.

news.summary: Merck & Co. Inc.'s drug Welireg (belzutifan) has been approved by the U.S. FDA for adult and pediatric patients aged 12 and above with locally advanced, unresectable, or metastatic pheochromocytoma or paraganglioma (PPGL), rare neuroendocrine tumors. This approval marks the first for an oral therapy for PPGL. Welireg was also approved by the FDA and European Medicines Agency for adult patients with advanced renal cell carcinoma (RCC). Merck & Co. Inc.'s Q1 earnings surpassed Wall Street expectations. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: FDA approves Merck's Welireg for PPGL, a rare type of neuroendocrine tumors, in patients 12+ years. Also approved for RCC.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy is facing some challenges, with the International Monetary Fund revising its growth forecast to 4.1% for this year, down from 4.2% in April. This downgrade is attributed to trade tensions, geopolitical uncertainties, and the potential impact of a disorderly Brexit. The report also highlights that global trade is expected to grow by 2.6% this year, a significant decrease from the initial projection of 3.4%. Additionally, the IMF warns that the ongoing trade dispute between the US and China could lead to a further slowdown in global economic growth.
news.headline: Ethereum's price surged by 30% in just one week, backed by Bernstein analysis.

news.summary: Serina Therapeutics, Inc. has granted options to purchase 15,000 shares of its common stock to two new non-executive employees on March 20, 2025. Each Option Grant was offered as an inducement to their employment, with an exercise price equal to the closing stock price on that date. The grants were approved by the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors to align interests with stockholders. The grants will vest over time, with one-fourth becoming exercisable on the first anniversary of the grant date, and the remainder vesting in three equal annual installments thereafter. This press release was issued to comply with NYSE American’s disclosure requirements under Company Guide Section 711(a).
news.headline: Serina Therapeutics grants 15,000 shares to new employees under Inducement Plan, with vesting over 3 years.

news.summary: Shares of Rigetti Computing, Inc. (NASDAQ: RGTI) are experiencing a surge today after a decline yesterday. The company recently announced first-quarter earnings, with revenue coming in at $1.47 million, below the anticipated $2.55 million. However, they reported earnings of 13 cents per share, surpassing the predicted loss of 6 cents per share. Needham analyst N. Quinn Bolton has adjusted the price target from $17.00 to $15.00, maintaining a Buy rating. Bolton noted that the revenue did not meet their expectations, possibly due to awaiting reauthorization of the DOE Quantum Leadership Act (formerly the NQI). For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Rigetti Computing revenue misses estimates at $1.47M, earnings higher at 13 cents per share. Analyst cuts price forecast to $15.

news.summary: In a historic announcement made in Doha, Qatar, on May 14, 2025, Qatar Airways and Boeing revealed a groundbreaking deal. The carrier has committed to buying a staggering 210 widebody jets from Boeing, marking a new milestone as the largest widebody order in the company's history. This order includes a record number of 787 Dreamliners, emphasizing the significance of the purchase. Notably, this agreement also signifies Qatar Airways' largest-ever jet purchase, highlighting the scale and importance of this deal in the aviation industry.
news.headline: Qatar Airways to buy up to 210 Boeing widebody jets, largest order for Boeing - includes 787 Dreamliners, setting new records.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas on May 14, 2025, Nasdaq expressed backing for Texas Senate Bill 29 as Governor Abbott approved the bill. This law establishes the Business Judgment Rule, fostering certainty in corporate governance disputes, thereby boosting Texas’ appeal for incorporation and business expansion. During the bill signing, Nasdaq's Executive Vice Chairman, Ed Knight, stood alongside Governor Abbott, Texas legislative members, and local business figures. This move is expected to fortify Texas' position as a favorable destination for business development and legal protection.
news.headline: Nasdaq praises Texas Senate Bill 29, enhancing corporate governance & innovation. Signed by Gov. Abbott, promotes predictability & competitiveness.
